name: Heavenly Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and chocolate over the top of a double boiler.
2. Gradually stir in sugar, about 4 tablespoons at a time.
3. Slowly add the Pet milk while continuing to cook until smooth and silky.
4. Heat as needed to pour over ice cream or pound cake.
5. Store well in the refrigerator for an extended period.
